channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: British Columbia Reflects on a Decade of Toxic Drug Crisis
item.description: British Columbia is observing the tenth anniversary of its public health emergency declared in response to the ongoing toxic drug crisis. The declaration, made in April 2016, followed a surge in overd...

item.title: DA Wins Retraction After Defamatory Blog Post About Stellenbosch Municipality
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) announced that it has successfully secured a full retraction from an online publication called 'The Cape Independent' after the blog published what the DA described as a d...

item.title: Pakistan launches AI Seekho 2026 initiative in partnership with Google to train youth in AI skills
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has partnered with Google for Developers along with the Ministry of IT and Telecommunication, Telenor, and Innovista to launch a nationwide initiative called ‘AI Seekho 2026...

item.title: Kejriwal Seeks Judge's Recusal in Delhi Excise Case, Alleges Bias
item.description: Former Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal, along with Manish Sisodia and others, has filed a petition before the Delhi High Court seeking the recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from hearing the...

item.title: DCI arrests suspect over death of RIAT College student in Kisumu
item.description: In Kisumu West, detectives from the Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have arrested a prime suspect in connection with the death of a 21-year-old RIAT College student whose body was discove...

item.title: Florida teenager charged as adult in death of stepsister aboard Carnival cruise ship in international waters
item.description: A 16-year-old Florida boy has been indicted on federal charges of murder and aggravated sexual abuse in connection with the death of his 18-year-old stepsister, Anna Kepner, aboard the Carnival Horizo...

item.title: US Imposes Strait of Hormuz Blockade, Amid Stalled Peace Talks with Iran
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated significantly, with President Trump announcing a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global oil shipments. This action fol...

item.title: Shrinking budgets reveal the real effectiveness of marketing and media strategies
item.description: This opinion piece explores how economic pressure is reshaping the marketing and media landscape, with a strong focus on accountability and strategic clarity. The author explains that during periods o...

item.title: US–Iran talks stall in Islamabad as Washington says next move rests with Tehran
item.description: U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance has said that significant progress was made during recent high-level peace talks between the United States and Iran, but the responsibility for moving the process forwar...

item.title: UK refuses to participate in Strait of Hormuz blockade, focuses on reopening route
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer on Monday emphasized that UK would not get pulled into the ongoing Iran conflict and would not support any blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Speaking on BBC Radio 5...

item.title: Kenya drawn in Group B for FIFAe Nations League debut against regional rivals
item.description: Kenya is set to make its debut in the FIFAe Nations League tournament after being placed in Group B alongside Chad, Mauritius, Nigeria, Senegal and Tanzania. The announcement marks a big step for the ...

item.title: Nxumalo refutes allegations of cash payments involving Malema in ongoing defamation case
item.description: Sandton businessman Zesimdumise “Ze” Nxumalo has formally denied allegations that EFF leader Julius Malema delivered cash or luxury items, including whisky, to Jotham “Mswazi” Msibi. In a confirmatory...

item.title: Lebanon moves toward direct talks with Israel to pursue ceasefire amid escalating conflict
item.description: Lebanon has indicated that it is seeking to establish a ceasefire agreement with Israel through direct negotiations as tensions continue to rise in the region. According to Foreign Minister Youssef Ra...

item.title: Swalwell exits California governor’s race amid scandal, reshaping Democratic field
item.description: Eric Swalwell has withdrawn from the California governor’s race and announced his resignation from Congress following serious allegations of sexual assault and misconduct involving multiple women. The...

item.title: Kenya–Israel cooperation highlights lessons for strengthening healthcare systems in Africa
item.description: In this opinion piece marking World Health Day, the Ambassador of Israel to Kenya reflects on the importance of healthcare systems and international cooperation, with a focus on Kenya–Israel collabora...

item.title: Investment Summit to Boost Niger Delta Economy
item.description: The Niger Delta region is poised for significant economic growth with the upcoming investment summit aiming to attract $5 billion in inflows and create 500,000 jobs. Organizers anticipate a surge in i...

item.title: Global Anxiety Over US President's Escalating Rhetoric and Middle East Conflict
item.description: Brigid Delaney captures a pervasive sense of dread akin to the early COVID days, as people wake at 3am to check news amid escalating US-Iran tensions. US President Donald Trump has issued alarming pos...

item.title: Israeli airstrike in Gaza kills four as fragile ceasefire talks continue in Cairo
item.description: An Israeli air strike in the Gaza Strip has killed at least four Palestinians as delicate ceasefire negotiations continue in Cairo, according to health officials and mediators. The strike reportedly h...

item.title: JD Vance faces setbacks in Iran negotiations and Hungarian election backing effort
item.description: U.S. Vice-President JD Vance reportedly faced two significant diplomatic and political setbacks following separate international engagements involving Iran and Hungary. According to reporting by AFP, ...

item.title: British Influencer Details Fans' Reactions to Justin Bieber's Coachella Performance
item.description: A British influencer has shared insights into the audience's reaction to Justin Bieber's headlining performance at Coachella, describing it as 'unrehearsed and sloppy,' leading to widespread disappoin...
